stemHtml: Which of the following correctly defines both en-route and destination alternates?

options.a: An en-route alternate is designated for emergency use during the flight, while a destination alternate replaces the intended destination.
options.b: An en-route alternate is always closer to the departure point than the destination.
options.c: A destination alternate must have better weather than the destination.
options.d: An en-route alternate is only required for ETOPS operations.
